description: Style NoteFrom the screen straight into her wardrobe, girls will simply love this T-shirt from hannah montana. Team it with shorts or jeans and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsWhite T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, pink panels on the shoulders and a graphic print in front Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry lowUse non chlorine bleach onlyDo not iron or dry clean if decorated
